fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in North Dakota.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP
Submit Application
steps.description: Submit with fees to the Board.

telepractice_text: North Dakota permits telepractice for licensed SLPs. North Dakota is not currently a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: North Dakota issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: North Dakota does not participate in the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a North Dakota SLP license cost?
Is North Dakota part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does North Dakota allow telepractice for SLPs?
faqs.answer: Yes, with a valid ND license.
